home.aboutDesc: Aohong Electronics is a professional PCB R&D and manufacturing enterprise, listed on the Shanghai Stock Exchange in 2020.
home.aboutContent1: Our products are applied in fields such as Consumer & Office, Automotive Electronics, Power & Energy, Industrial Control & Medical, AI Computing, Satellite Internet, and Communication & Security. We serve brand customers in more than 20 countries and regions around the world.
home.aboutContent2: Our mission is 'Bearing Digital Technology, Empowering Smart Life.'
home.applicationDesc: Aohong Electronics continuously innovates. Our R&D-driven PCB products are designed to meet the application requirements of diverse fields and scenarios.
home.newsDesc: Follow the latest updates from Aohong Electronics to explore technological innovation and new opportunities in industry development.
home.serviceDesc: Aohong Electronics cooperates deeply with global leading enterprises to drive technological innovation and industry advancement.

esg.deviceLowLevelHighTemp: Low liquid level and high-temperature protection for equipment
esg.reduceChemicalUsage: Reduction of HCl, NaClO₂, and other consumables by over 90%
esg.gasOrganizedEmission: Organized emission of exhaust gas with ring suction
esg.gasControlSystem: Centralized integrated control system for exhaust emissions
esg.highEfficiencyFeature: Integrated system: Chilled water + Air compressor + Water source heat pump + Energy recovery

esg.gasBoilerReplacement: Replacement of electric heating with gas boilers
esg.heatRecoverySystem: Energy saving and consumption reduction through heat recovery systems
